title: ECharts Segment 04
summary: ECharts 5.2 development segment centered on the introduction of universal transition animation across all series types, a major SeriesData refactoring (renaming List to SeriesData, adding DataStore layer), custom series type improvements, emphasis color inheritance, polar bar label positioning, tooltip enhancements (DOM content, offset, pointer-events), effect scatter ripple count, gauge detail z-ordering, and sector label position calculations.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: ECharts 5.2 development segment centered on the introduction of universal transition animation across all series types, a major SeriesData refactoring (renaming List to SeriesData, adding DataStore layer), custom series type improvements, emphasis color inheritance, polar bar label positioning, tooltip enhancements (DOM content, offset, pointer-events), effect scatter ripple count, gauge detail z-ordering, and sector label position calculations.

nodes.label: Data Layer (SeriesData Refactor)
nodes.description: Major refactoring from List to SeriesData, introduction of DataStore, SeriesDimensionDefine, SeriesDataSchema, and helpers for data providers, transforms, and dimension management. The largest module in this segment.

nodes.label: Custom Series
nodes.description: CustomSeries, CustomView, and prepare modules. Enhanced with improved TypeScript types, universal transition support, and toolbox feature registration integration.

nodes.label: Animation & Universal Transition
nodes.description: Universal transition system (universalTransition.ts), morph transition helper, and basic transition utilities. The core of the new cross-series animation feature that enables animated morphing between chart types.

nodes.label: Chart Helpers
nodes.description: Shared drawing primitives (Symbol, SymbolDraw, EffectSymbol, Line, LineDraw, LargeLineDraw, pieHelper, whiskerBoxCommon, createSeriesData). Touched by emphasis color inheritance, effect scatter ripple count, and the SeriesData rename propagation.

nodes.label: Core ECharts Engine
nodes.description: The main ECharts entry, lifecycle management, extension API, and export modules. Enhanced with universal transition hook points, dispose memory release fix, and label layout installation.

nodes.label: Utility & Type Definitions
nodes.description: Shared utilities including types.ts, states.ts, symbol.ts, number.ts, time.ts, styleCompat.ts, model.ts, and innerStore.ts. Touched by emphasis color inheritance, symbol type improvements, millisecond formatting, and the tooltip pointer-events typo fix.

nodes.label: Label System
nodes.description: Label style, sector label positioning, and label layout installation. Polar bar middle-label and round-cap label-distance fixes are the primary changes along with the sector label position calculations.

nodes.label: Other Components
nodes.description: Toolbox features (DataView, SaveAsImage, Brush, MagicType), dataZoom, timeline, visualMap, geo view, marker views, and helper modules. Includes toolbox type improvements, geo show-toggle, and coord dimension creators.

nodes.label: Bar Chart
nodes.description: BarView, BarSeries, BaseBarSeries, and PictorialBarView. Touched by polar bar middle-label fix, round-cap label distance optimization, pictorialbar zero-values handling, and bar emphasis color inheritance.

nodes.label: Misc Chart Types
nodes.description: Candlestick, boxplot, heatmap, parallel, themeRiver, scatter, lines, effectScatter, funnel, and map series/views. Broadly touched by the SeriesData rename, emphasis color inherit, and type propagation.

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.description: TooltipView, TooltipHTMLContent, and TooltipRichContent. Fixes for DOM content display, null access guard, offset spacing, pointer-events typo, hover refresh, and candlestick tooltip overflow.

nodes.label: Model Layer
nodes.description: Global model, Series model, and mixin modules (dataFormat). Enhanced with universal transition series identification and custom series type improvements for the model registration system.

nodes.label: Tree & Treemap Charts
nodes.description: TreemapView, TreemapSeries, and TreeView. Fixes for treemap hidden labels, stale node cleanup, treeAncestors callback, and tree root edge cleanup.

nodes.label: Pie Chart
nodes.description: PieSeries, PieView, pieLayout, install, and labelLayout. Fixes for pie negative values, round borderJoin, sunburst borderRadius reset, and map data types integration.

nodes.label: Render Pipeline & Layout
nodes.description: Layout (barGrid, points), processors (dataFilter, negativeDataFilter), view base classes, and visual solution helpers. Touched by the negative data filter for pie and the SeriesData rename.

nodes.label: Line Chart
nodes.description: LineView, LineSeries, helper, and lineAnimationDiff. Fixes for visual gradient infinity, lines clear artifacts, and line animation updates.

nodes.label: Visual Mapping
nodes.description: Visual mapping helpers, aria visual, symbol visual, LegendVisualProvider, and common visual types. Updated for emphasis color inheritance and the SeriesData API rename.

nodes.label: Coordinate Systems & Scales
nodes.description: Axis helpers, coordinate system creators, scale implementations, and model creators. Touched by coord dimension creators, axis common types for symbol improvements, and the SeriesData rename propagation.

nodes.label: Gauge Chart
nodes.description: GaugeView and GaugeSeries. Fixes for gauge detail z-ordering (on top), gauge pointer z-level, and gauge series type improvements.

nodes.label: Radar Chart
nodes.description: RadarView and RadarSeries. Fixes for radar round lineJoin and radar symbol border scale behavior.

edges.label: custom series renders from SeriesData API
universal transition hooks into core update cycle
transition system reads data for morph matching

chart helpers use symbol, states, and type utilities
bar charts use Symbol, SymbolDraw helpers
misc charts use shared drawing primitives
bar chart uses sector label for polar bars
pie chart uses label layout system
tooltip registers as component with core

components depend on coordinate system APIs
tooltip uses format and type utilities
pipeline processors registered with core scheduler
